chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Transfer Application No.S-08 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.300/2025. 3. For orders on M.A No.154/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 05.03.2026 = Neither the applicants nor their counsel were present when the case was fixed on 09.12.2024, 09.04.2025, 09.05.2025, 23.05.2025 and 26.02.2026. Even today, when the matter was called, neither the applicants nor their counsel are present. Report received from the concerned court reflects that the instant application was filed while Suit No.25/2024, which was prayed to be transferred from the learned court, has already been decided. The record from the learned court reflects that the said suit was disposed of under Order XXIII Rule 3 CPC vide order dated 29.10.2024. In view of the above report, it appears that the relief sought in this application has become infructuous; therefore, the instant Civil Transfer Application is dismissed being infructuous along with the listed applications. JUDGE *Faisal*
